name: http_get_json
description: Fetch JSON from a URL with timeout and error handling
document:
Skill: http_get_json
Description: Fetch JSON from a URL with timeout and error handling
```python
import requests

def http_get_json(url, timeout=15):
    resp = requests.get(url, timeout=timeout)
    resp.raise_for_status()
    return resp.json()
```
